question: Is there a clock in the kitchen? Select from the following options: (A) No, there is no clock in the kitchen. (B) Yes, there is a clock on the wall. (C) There is a clock on the fridge. (D) There is a clock on the countertop.
gold_answer: Yes, there is a clock on the wall
answer_choices: No, there is no clock in the kitchen
Yes, there is a clock on the wall
There is a clock on the fridge
There is a clock on the countertop
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
